title: Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 123 Posts
org: Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd, Telangana (Dept. of Rural Development, Govt. of Telangana)
shortInfo: Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Stree Nidhi recruitment notification 2026 for 123 Assistant Manager (Field Operations) vacancies under the Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd, Telangana. The online application process starts on 9th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 29th May 2026. Find Stree Nidhi vacancies across Telangana on the official website www.streenidhi.telangana.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the dir

basic_details.organization_name: Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd, Telangana (Dept. of Rural Development, Govt. of Telangana)
basic_details.department: Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd. (Apex Credit Society, Telangana State)
basic_details.short_information: Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Stree Nidhi recruitment notification 2026 for 123 Assistant Manager (Field Operations) vacancies under the Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd, Telangana. The online application process starts on 9th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 29th May 2026. Find Stree Nidhi vacancies across Telangana on the official website www.streenidhi.telangana.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the dir

important_dates.online examination date: June / July 2026 (To be notified on Stree Nidhi website)

application_fee.details: Candidates applying for the post of Assistant Manager are required to pay a non-refundable application fee (inclusive of GST) as specified below. The fee must be paid online only through the IBPS application portal. Bank transaction charges / payment gateway charges will have to be borne by the candidate separately. Fee paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be between 25 and 30 years of age prior to the date of release of this notification (09-05-2026). The upper age limit is relaxed for reserved categories as specified below. In no case shall the maximum age exceed the relaxed limit applicable to the candidate's category.

qualification.required_degree: Bachelor's degree from any recognized University in India with minimum 65% marks for OCs, 60% marks for BCs and 55% marks for SCs/STs/PWDs.
qualification.domicile: Must be a native of Telangana state only. Nativity certificate issued by MRO is mandatory.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of release of the notification (09-05-2026). The candidate must be a native of Telangana state and must apply only for vacancies in their native district. Applications made for a different district will not be considered. Nativity certificate issued by MRO only will be accepted as proof of nativity for the applied district. | The educational qualification must be from a recognized University established under Central Act, Provincial Act, State Act or an Institution recognized by the UGC. Candidates in their final semester are not eligible. Knowledge in MS Office is mandatory. Excellent communication skills and proficiency in computers and Information Technology are required. | Educational Qualification | Other Requirements

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 21,600/- per month (Total emoluments approximately Rs. 33,960/- per month)
salary_details.fixed travel allowance (fta): Rs. 3,500/- to Rs. 4,000/- (based on no. of MSs/TLFs allotted)
salary_details.additional allowance: Based on visits to allotted VOs/SLFs
salary_details.vehicle maintenance allowance: Rs. 700/- (only on possession and use of own two-wheeler with valid licence)
salary_details.daily allowance (da): Rs. 3,500/- approx. (depending on no. of days of tour undertaken)
salary_details.details: The total emoluments for the post of Assistant Manager will be approximately Rs. 33,960/- per month. The remuneration includes Basic Pay, eligible Special Allowance, HRA, CCA, and PF contribution by employee and employer. There is a scope for revision in salary in future.

selection_process: S. No. Name of Test No. of Questions Maximum Marks Duration
S. No. Exam Centre S. No. Exam Centre

The selection process for Stree Nidhi AM Recruitment 2026 consists of an Online Examination followed by Document Verification and Medical Examination. Candidates who secure more than the prescribed minimum qualifying marks will be ranked in descending order on the basis of aggregate marks obtained in the Online Examination under their respective category (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/GEN/SHG member). Only candidates who applied from the district and pass the Online Examination (above cut-off marks in each test) will be shortlisted for selection in order of merit under the respective category.
Note: All tests will be in English only. There is a penalty for wrong answers — for each wrong answer
25% (one-fourth) of the marks assigned to that question will be deducted. No penalty for unattempted questions. Calculators
or any electronic gadgets are not permitted during the Online Examination.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the IBPS portal, accessible via the official Stree Nidhi website https://www.streenidhi.telangana.gov.in under the "Careers" section. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal will be active from 09-05-2026 (00:00 Hrs) to 29-05-2026 (24:00 Hrs). Candidates must apply only for their native district — applications for a different district will not be considered.

New users must register by clicking "Click here for New Registration" and entering their name, contact details, and Email ID. A Provisional Registration Number and Password will be generated and sent via Email and SMS. Existing registered users can directly log in using their Provisional Registration Number and Password. Candidates should avoid submitting multiple applications. After final submission, no changes will be permitted.
Documents to be Scanned and Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Recent passport size photograph (4.5cm × 3.5cm) in jpg/jpeg format (20kb–50kb)
Signature with black ink on white paper in jpg/jpeg format (10kb–20kb)
Left thumb impression on white paper with black or blue ink in jpg/jpeg format (20kb–50kb)
Handwritten declaration in English (not in CAPITAL LETTERS) on white paper with black ink in jpg/jpeg format (50kb–100kb)
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Document Verification (on being called):
Valid Call Letter and Photo Identity Proof (PAN Card / Passport / Permanent Driving License / Voter's Card / Aadhaar Card / Bank Passbook with photograph / Employee ID etc.)
Nativity Certificate issued by MRO (for native district proof)
Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets
Category/Caste certificate (SC/ST/BC/EWS/OH) as applicable
Income certificate (for BC non-creamy layer, issued within last 3 years)
SHG Member ID / VO/SHG name (if claiming SHG category reservation)
Relieving certificate from previous employer (if currently employed)
Valid Driving Licence (or to be acquired within 2 months of joining)
Apply Online at: https://www.streenidhi.telangana.gov.in (under Careers section)

Candidate Grievance / Help: For any problem in filling the form or payment of fee, complaints may be made at https://cgrs.ibps.in/ — mention "Stree Nidhi – Recruitment for the post of Assistant Manager" in the subject.
important_instructions: Only natives of Telangana state are eligible to apply. Candidates must apply only for their native district. Candidates must possess the prescribed minimum qualification (degree certificate) prior to the date of release of notification. Candidates in their final semester are not eligible. No application other than Online mode will be accepted. Application fee is non-refundable. Incomplete applications without fee will be rejected. SHG member applicants must not be defaulters in repayment to Stree Nidhi or any bank; outstanding dues must be cleared before applying. Candidates who have defaulted in repayment under any lending arrangement with Stree Nidhi/Banks/NBFCs/Financial Institutions are not eligible. Candidates are advised to check/confirm CIBIL score/status before applying. Individuals whose employment with Stree Nidhi has previously been terminated for any reason are strictly not eligible to apply. This is a contract-based post and not a government job. Selected candidates will be on probation for 1 year followed by a 5-year contract, renewable yearly based on performance review. Mobile phones and electronic gadgets are banned inside the examination premises. Candidates must arrive at the examination centre at least 2 hours before the test start time for verification formalities. Candidates reporting late will not be permitted to take the examination. Biometric data (thumb impression/IRIS) may be captured at various stages. Candidates are advised not to apply mehndi, ink, or chemicals on their hands or wear contact lenses. Candidates are advised to visit https://www.streenidhi.telangana.gov.in regularly for all updates regarding the recruitment process. All decisions of Stree Nidhi regarding eligibility, selection, and other matters are final and binding. Any legal proceedings can be instituted only in Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q1. What is Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 is a state‑level notification for 123 Assistant Manager (Field Operations) posts in Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd, Telangana, under the Department of Rural Development. It offers contract‑based field jobs across 27 districts to support SHG women through microfinance and livelihood promotion.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 123 vacancies for Assistant Manager (Field Operations) in this recruitment. These posts are distributed district‑wise across all 27 districts of Telangana such as Adilabad, Khammam, Warangal, Rangareddy, Nalgonda, and others as given in Annexure‑I of the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application date for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager posts 2026?
faq.answer: The online application and fee payment for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 will be open from 09 May 2026 (00:00 hrs) to 29 May 2026 (24:00 hrs). Candidates must apply only through the IBPS link available on the official Stree Nidhi website; no other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary of Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager (Field Operations)?
faq.answer: The gross salary for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager is Rs. 21,600 per month, and the total approximate emoluments are around Rs. 33,960 per month including FTA, DA, vehicle maintenance allowance, performance‑linked variable pay and other admissible allowances. There is also scope for revision of salary in future as per Stree Nidhi HR policy.

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility criteria for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree from a recognized university with minimum 65% marks for OC, 60% for BC, and 55% for SC/ST/PwD candidates. They must be natives of Telangana, know MS Office, and be able to read, write, and speak both Telugu and English.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager is 25 to 30 years for OC/EWS candidates as on 09 May 2026. Upper age is relaxable by 3 years for BC candidates and 5 years for SC/ST/PwD (OH) candidates, subject to maximum age conditions mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. How is the selection process for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: Selection will be done through a single Online Examination followed by document verification and medical fitness. The online exam consists of 100 objective questions (Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning, English, General Awareness including Banking) for 100 marks in 90 minutes with 1/4 negative marking for each wrong answer.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any special requirements like two‑wheeler or caution deposit for Stree Nidhi AM?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates must be willing to tour at least 20 days per month in their allotted area and must own a two‑wheeler or acquire it within three months of joining along with a valid driving licence within two months. They also need to deposit Rs. 35,000 as caution deposit with Stree Nidhi for two years at the time of joining.

faq.question: Q9. Who can apply for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager – can candidates from other states apply?
faq.answer: Only natives of Telangana state are eligible for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026. Candidates must apply only for vacancies in their native district, and a nativity certificate from the MRO of that district is compulsory; applications for other districts will be rejected.

faq.question: Q10. Is Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager a government job and is the contract period permanent?
faq.answer: Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager is a contract‑based post, not a regular government job. Selected candidates will be on probation for 1 year followed by a 5‑year contract, which may be renewed every year based on performance and organizational requirements.

faq.answer: Selection will be done through a single Online Examination followed by document verification and medical fitness. The online exam consists of 100 objective questions (Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning, English, General Awareness including Banking) for 100 marks in 90 minutes with 1/4 negative marking for each wrong answer.

faq.question: Are there any special requirements like two‑wheeler or caution deposit for Stree Nidhi AM?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates must be willing to tour at least 20 days per month in their allotted area and must own a two‑wheeler or acquire it within three months of joining along with a valid driving licence within two months. They also need to deposit Rs. 35,000 as caution deposit with Stree Nidhi for two years at the time of joining.

faq.question: Who can apply for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager – can candidates from other states apply?
faq.answer: Only natives of Telangana state are eligible for Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026. Candidates must apply only for vacancies in their native district, and a nativity certificate from the MRO of that district is compulsory; applications for other districts will be rejected.

faq.question: Is Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager a government job and is the contract period permanent?
faq.answer: Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager is a contract‑based post, not a regular government job. Selected candidates will be on probation for 1 year followed by a 5‑year contract, which may be renewed every year based on performance and organizational requirements.
